proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher serum albumin (albumin_g_dl) is associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher LDH (ldh_u_l) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Greater 6-month weight loss percent (weight_loss_pct_6mo) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Older age_years is associated with longer pfs_months in this cohort.
Higher ECOG performance status (ecog_ps) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Stage IV (stage_iv==1) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Presence of brain metastases (has_brain_mets==1) is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Univariate OLS: beta = 0.441 months per g/dL, p = 2.80e-109.
Univariate OLS: beta = -0.00051 months per U/L, p = 3.55e-05.
Univariate OLS: beta = -0.073 months per % weight loss, p = 7.48e-179.
Univariate OLS: beta = 0.170 months per year, p = 0.00e+00. Older age is paradoxically associated with longer PFS, consistent with selection of fitter elderly patients.
Univariate OLS: beta = -1.099 months per ECOG point, p = 0.00e+00.
Univariate OLS: beta = -1.438 months for stage IV vs not, p = 0.00e+00.
Univariate OLS: beta = -0.921 months for brain mets vs not, p = 0.00e+00.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Pembrolizumab (treatment_pembrolizumab==1) is associated with longer pfs_months than no pembrolizumab (overall main effect).
Sotorasib (treatment_sotorasib==1) is associated with longer pfs_months than no sotorasib (overall main effect).
Olaparib (treatment_olaparib==1) is associated with longer pfs_months than no olaparib (overall main effect).
Osimertinib (treatment_osimertinib==1) is associated with longer pfs_months than no osimertinib (overall main effect).

analyses.result_summary: treatment_pembrolizumab: mean PFS on=3.414 mo (n=25008), off=3.449 (n=24992). Unadjusted OLS beta=-0.035, p=8.11e-02.
Multivariable-adjusted (other treatments + demographics + biomarkers + labs): beta=-0.006, p=3.89e-01.
treatment_sotorasib: mean PFS on=3.641 mo (n=17544), off=3.319 (n=32456). Unadjusted OLS beta=0.322, p=1.56e-53.
Multivariable-adjusted (other treatments + demographics + biomarkers + labs): beta=0.323, p=0.00e+00.
treatment_olaparib: mean PFS on=3.414 mo (n=14999), off=3.439 (n=35001). Unadjusted OLS beta=-0.025, p=2.55e-01.
Multivariable-adjusted (other treatments + demographics + biomarkers + labs): beta=0.002, p=7.32e-01.
treatment_osimertinib: mean PFS on=3.434 mo (n=14976), off=3.431 (n=35024). Unadjusted OLS beta=0.004, p=8.70e-01.
Multivariable-adjusted (other treatments + demographics + biomarkers + labs): beta=0.001, p=8.64e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In EGFR-mutated (egfr_mutation==1) patients, osimertinib (treatment_osimertinib==1) is associated with longer pfs_months than no osimertinib.
In KRAS G12C-mutated (kras_g12c==1) patients, sotorasib (treatment_sotorasib==1) is associated with longer pfs_months than no sotorasib.
In BRCA2-mutated (brca2_mutation==1) patients, olaparib (treatment_olaparib==1) is associated with longer pfs_months than no olaparib.
In PD-L1 high (pdl1_tps>=0.5) patients, pembrolizumab (treatment_pembrolizumab==1) is associated with longer pfs_months than no pembrolizumab.
In tumor-mutational-burden-high (tmb_high==1) patients, pembrolizumab (treatment_pembrolizumab==1) is associated with longer pfs_months than no pembrolizumab.

analyses.result_summary: Within egfr_mutation==1 (n=6517): mean PFS on=3.586 vs off=3.600; beta=-0.014, p=8.09e-01.
Within kras_g12c==1 (n=6368): mean PFS on=5.766 vs off=3.213; beta=2.552, p=2.54e-275.
Within brca2_mutation==1 (n=1519): mean PFS on=3.324 vs off=3.314; beta=0.010, p=9.32e-01.
Within pdl1_tps>=0.5 (n=10749): mean PFS on=3.407 vs off=3.477; beta=-0.070, p=1.06e-01.
Within tmb_high==1 (n=14258): mean PFS on=3.272 vs off=3.320; beta=-0.048, p=2.00e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive treatment_osimertinib x egfr_mutation interaction on pfs_months (osimertinib's PFS benefit is greater in EGFR-mutated than EGFR-wildtype patients).
There is a positive treatment_sotorasib x kras_g12c interaction on pfs_months (sotorasib's PFS benefit is greater in KRAS G12C-mutated than KRAS G12C-wildtype patients).
There is a positive treatment_olaparib x brca2_mutation interaction on pfs_months (olaparib's PFS benefit is greater in BRCA2-mutated than BRCA2-wildtype patients).
There is a positive treatment_pembrolizumab x pdl1_high interaction on pfs_months (pembrolizumab's PFS benefit is greater in PD-L1>=50% than <50% patients).
There is a positive treatment_pembrolizumab x tmb_high interaction on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction term coefficient = -0.020, p = 7.58e-01.
Interaction term coefficient = 2.558, p = 0.00e+00.
Interaction term coefficient = 0.037, p = 7.78e-01.
Interaction term coefficient = -0.045, p = 3.56e-01.
Interaction term coefficient = -0.018, p = 6.85e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: At least one feature in the dataset shows a significant treatment_pembrolizumab x feature interaction on pfs_months.
At least one feature shows a significant treatment_sotorasib x feature interaction on pfs_months beyond kras_g12c (suggesting an additional modifier of sotorasib effect).
At least one feature shows a significant treatment_olaparib x feature interaction on pfs_months.
At least one feature shows a significant treatment_osimertinib x feature interaction on pfs_months.
Sotorasib has a strong negative interaction with sex_female on pfs_months, i.e. the sotorasib PFS benefit is concentrated in male (sex_female==0) patients.

analyses.code: for f in features: smf.ols(f'pfs_months ~ treatment_pembrolizumab*{f}', data=df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Top treatment_pembrolizumab x feature interactions (lowest p): weight_loss_pct_6mo: beta=0.018, p=3.15e-04; stage_iv: beta=0.108, p=6.77e-03; kras_g12c: beta=-0.113, p=5.65e-02. 2 interactions reach p<0.01.

analyses.code: for f in features: smf.ols(f'pfs_months ~ treatment_sotorasib*{f}', data=df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Top treatment_sotorasib x feature interactions: kras_g12c: beta=2.558, p=0.00e+00; sex_female: beta=-0.562, p=5.30e-41; smoking_current: beta=0.272, p=1.72e-09; alk_fusion: beta=-0.488, p=4.13e-07; egfr_mutation: beta=-0.241, p=9.93e-05. sex_female interaction: beta=-0.562, p=5.30e-41 (sotorasib effect is markedly smaller/absent in females).

analyses.code: for f in features: smf.ols(f'pfs_months ~ treatment_olaparib*{f}', data=df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Top treatment_olaparib x feature interactions: pdl1_low: beta=0.186, p=6.23e-03; bun_mg_dl: beta=0.011, p=1.36e-02; crp_mg_l: beta=0.006, p=2.15e-02. Only 1 interactions reach p<0.01 - no robust modifier.

analyses.code: for f in features: smf.ols(f'pfs_months ~ treatment_osimertinib*{f}', data=df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Top treatment_osimertinib x feature interactions: alk_fusion: beta=0.238, p=1.72e-02; brca2_mutation: beta=-0.254, p=4.96e-02; potassium_meq_l: beta=0.056, p=1.98e-01. 0 interactions reach p<0.01 (none strongly).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within EGFR-mutated patients, restricting to ECOG<=1 increases the osimertinib PFS benefit (osimertinib coefficient is positive and larger than in the full EGFR-mutated subgroup).
Within KRAS G12C-mutated and ECOG<=1 patients, sotorasib is associated with longer pfs_months than no sotorasib (refined positive subgroup for sotorasib).
Within PDL1-high (pdl1_tps>=0.5), TMB-high (tmb_high==1), and ECOG<=1 patients, pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within BRCA2-mutated and ECOG<=1 patients, olaparib is associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_osimertinib', data=df[mask]).fit()  # mask = egfr_mutation==1 AND ecog<=1 AND any-stage
analyses.result_summary: Subgroup egfr_mutation==1 AND ecog<=1 AND any-stage, n=5526, on=1682: mean on=3.814 vs off=3.860; beta=-0.046, p=4.62e-01.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_sotorasib', data=df[mask]).fit()  # mask = kras_g12c==1 AND ecog<=1
analyses.result_summary: Subgroup kras_g12c==1 AND ecog<=1, n=5414, on=1891: mean on=6.006 vs off=3.421; beta=2.585, p=4.19e-241.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_pembrolizumab', data=df[mask]).fit()  # mask = pdl1_tps>=0.5 AND tmb_high==1 AND ecog<=1
analyses.result_summary: Subgroup pdl1_tps>=0.5 AND tmb_high==1 AND ecog<=1, n=2666, on=1347: mean on=3.545 vs off=3.497; beta=0.048, p=5.76e-01.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_olaparib', data=df[mask]).fit()  # mask = brca2_mutation==1 AND ecog<=1
analyses.result_summary: Subgroup brca2_mutation==1 AND ecog<=1, n=1325, on=364: mean on=3.552 vs off=3.514; beta=0.038, p=7.68e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: STK11-mutated (stk11_mutation==1) status attenuates pembrolizumab's PFS benefit in PD-L1 high (pdl1_tps>=0.5) patients (pembrolizumab effect is more positive in stk11==0 than stk11==1 within PD-L1 high).
In PD-L1 high (pdl1_tps>=0.5) and STK11-wildtype (stk11_mutation==0) patients, pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months than no pembrolizumab.

analyses.code: compare pembro effect in pdl1_tps>=0.5 & stk11==0 vs pdl1_tps>=0.5 & stk11==1
analyses.result_summary: In PDL1-high & stk11==0 (n=9149): beta=-0.095, p=4.36e-02. In PDL1-high & stk11==1 (n=1600): beta=0.074, p=4.98e-01. The two coefficients differ in sign but the difference is not strong; pembrolizumab does not show clinically meaningful PFS benefit in either subgroup.

In PDL1>=0.5 & stk11==0 (n=9149): mean_on=3.402, mean_off=3.497; beta=-0.095, p=4.36e-02. Direction is *negative* — pembrolizumab is associated with marginally shorter PFS in this subgroup, opposite of the expected positive immunotherapy benefit.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Restricting to patients receiving only one treatment (monotherapy), sotorasib (treatment_sotorasib==1, with no other treatment) is associated with longer pfs_months than no treatment.
In monotherapy, pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months than no treatment.
In monotherapy, olaparib is associated with longer pfs_months than no treatment.
In monotherapy, osimertinib is associated with longer pfs_months than no treatment.

analyses.code: sub = df[(other treatments == 0)]; smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_sotorasib', data=sub).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Among patients on no other treatment (n=12207), treatment_sotorasib effect: beta=0.339, p=1.05e-15.

analyses.code: sub = df[(other treatments == 0)]; smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_pembrolizumab', data=sub).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Among patients on no other treatment (n=15933), treatment_pembrolizumab effect: beta=-0.020, p=5.43e-01.

analyses.code: sub = df[(other treatments == 0)]; smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_olaparib', data=sub).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Among patients on no other treatment (n=11285), treatment_olaparib effect: beta=-0.061, p=1.57e-01.

analyses.code: sub = df[(other treatments == 0)]; smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_osimertinib', data=sub).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Among patients on no other treatment (n=11277), treatment_osimertinib effect: beta=-0.001, p=9.78e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In EGFR-mutated patients with ECOG<=1, osimertinib remains positively associated with pfs_months relative to no osimertinib.
In KRAS G12C-mutated patients (kras_g12c==1), sotorasib's PFS benefit is the strongest treatment-effect signal in the dataset (very large positive coefficient).
In BRCA2-mutated and ECOG<=1 patients, olaparib is positively associated with pfs_months.
In PD-L1 high & STK11-wildtype & ECOG<=1, pembrolizumab is positively associated with pfs_months.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_osimertinib', data=df[mask]).fit()  # mask = egfr_mutation==1 & ecog<=1
analyses.result_summary: Subgroup 'egfr_mutation==1 & ecog<=1', n=5526: mean on=3.814 vs off=3.860; beta=-0.046, p=4.62e-01.
Subgroup 'kras_g12c==1', n=6368: mean on=5.766 vs off=3.213; beta=2.552, p=2.54e-275.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_olaparib', data=df[mask]).fit()  # mask = brca2_mutation==1 & ecog<=1
analyses.result_summary: Subgroup 'brca2_mutation==1 & ecog<=1', n=1325: mean on=3.552 vs off=3.514; beta=0.038, p=7.68e-01.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_pembrolizumab', data=df[mask]).fit()  # mask = pdl1_high & ecog<=1 & stk11==0
analyses.result_summary: Subgroup 'pdl1_high & ecog<=1 & stk11==0', n=7762: mean on=3.636 vs off=3.729; beta=-0.093, p=6.60e-02.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within EGFR-mutated patients, no clinical/molecular feature significantly modifies the (null) osimertinib effect on pfs_months.
Within KRAS G12C-mutated patients, baseline serum albumin (albumin_g_dl) modifies the sotorasib effect on pfs_months (interaction is non-zero).
Within BRCA2-mutated patients, no feature significantly modifies the (null) olaparib effect on pfs_months.

analyses.code: for f in features: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_osimertinib*{f}', data=df[egfr_mutation==1]).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Smallest interaction p among 9 features: stk11_mutation (beta=0.263, p=1.06e-01). No interaction is significant.
Sotorasib x albumin within KRAS G12C+: beta=-0.340, p=1.19e-02. Effect is small relative to the main sotorasib coefficient.

analyses.code: for f in features: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_olaparib*{f}', data=df[brca2_mutation==1]).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Smallest interaction p among 6 features: ldh_u_l (beta=-0.002, p=1.52e-01). No interaction is significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A regression-tree T-learner identifies a top-decile subgroup with a very large positive sotorasib treatment effect on pfs_months (consistent with the KRAS G12C+ subgroup).
A regression-tree T-learner does NOT identify any meaningful pembrolizumab-responsive subgroup with a clinically large positive treatment effect on pfs_months.
A regression-tree T-learner does not identify any meaningful olaparib-responsive subgroup with a clinically large positive treatment effect on pfs_months.
A regression-tree T-learner does not identify any meaningful osimertinib-responsive subgroup with a clinically large positive treatment effect on pfs_months.

analyses.code: T-learner DecisionTreeRegressor for treatment_sotorasib; report top-10pct CATE subgroup OLS
analyses.result_summary: Top 10pct predicted-CATE subgroup for treatment_sotorasib: n=5000, on=1779; in-subgroup OLS beta=2.592, p=1.30e-219; mean predicted CATE in top decile = 2.686, overall mean CATE = 0.312.

analyses.code: T-learner DecisionTreeRegressor for treatment_pembrolizumab; report top-10pct CATE subgroup OLS
analyses.result_summary: Top 10pct predicted-CATE subgroup for treatment_pembrolizumab: n=5000, on=2558; in-subgroup OLS beta=-0.010, p=8.59e-01; mean predicted CATE in top decile = 0.608, overall mean CATE = -0.036.

analyses.code: T-learner DecisionTreeRegressor for treatment_olaparib; report top-10pct CATE subgroup OLS
analyses.result_summary: Top 10pct predicted-CATE subgroup for treatment_olaparib: n=5000, on=1476; in-subgroup OLS beta=0.095, p=1.90e-01; mean predicted CATE in top decile = 0.166, overall mean CATE = 0.001.

analyses.code: T-learner DecisionTreeRegressor for treatment_osimertinib; report top-10pct CATE subgroup OLS
analyses.result_summary: Top 10pct predicted-CATE subgroup for treatment_osimertinib: n=5000, on=1487; in-subgroup OLS beta=-0.005, p=9.43e-01; mean predicted CATE in top decile = 0.989, overall mean CATE = -0.001.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Adjusting for treatments and demographics, higher albumin_g_dl is independently associated with longer pfs_months.
Adjusting for treatments and demographics, higher ldh_u_l is independently associated with shorter pfs_months.
Adjusting for treatments and demographics, greater 6-month weight loss is independently associated with shorter pfs_months.
After adjustment, the neutrophil-lymphocyte ratio (nlr) is independently associated with pfs_months.
After adjustment, pdl1_tps as a continuous predictor is independently associated with pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted beta for albumin_g_dl = 0.457, p = 0.00e+00.
Adjusted beta for ldh_u_l = -0.000, p = 4.47e-21.
Adjusted beta for weight_loss_pct_6mo = -0.073, p = 0.00e+00.
Adjusted beta for nlr = 0.000, p = 9.55e-01.
Adjusted beta for pdl1_tps = -0.002, p = 9.25e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Sotorasib's PFS benefit is modified by sex_female: the treatment effect is markedly smaller (or absent) in female (sex_female==1) patients than in males (sex_female==0).

Sotorasib's PFS benefit is modified by smoking_current: the treatment effect is larger in current smokers (smoking_current==1) than in non-current smokers - though once stratified within KRAS G12C+ this is small.
Pembrolizumab effect is not significantly modified by sex_female, age_years, or smoking status.

analyses.result_summary: sotorasib x sex_female: beta=-0.562, p=5.30e-41. The negative sign means sotorasib's PFS benefit is reduced (and effectively eliminated) in females.
sotorasib x smoking_current: beta=0.272, p=1.72e-09. Likely partly confounded by KRAS G12C prevalence in smokers.
pembro x sex_female: beta=0.020, p=6.17e-01. pembro x age_years: beta=-0.002, p=1.01e-01. None significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within KRAS G12C-mutated (kras_g12c==1) and male (sex_female==0) patients, sotorasib (treatment_sotorasib==1) is associated with substantially longer pfs_months than no sotorasib (large positive treatment effect).

Within KRAS G12C-mutated (kras_g12c==1) and female (sex_female==1) patients, sotorasib (treatment_sotorasib==1) shows NO PFS benefit relative to no sotorasib (treatment effect indistinguishable from zero).
There is a strong negative three-way interaction between treatment_sotorasib, kras_g12c, and sex_female on pfs_months: the sotorasib benefit is concentrated in male KRAS-G12C-positive patients.
Within KRAS G12C-mutated patients, BRCA2 mutation (brca2_mutation==1) substantially reduces the sotorasib PFS benefit (large negative interaction with sotorasib).

analyses.result_summary: KRAS G12C+ males (n=3508, on=1237): mean PFS on sotorasib = 7.876 mo vs off = 3.232 mo; beta=4.644, p=0.00e+00.
KRAS G12C+ females (n=2860, on=1009): mean PFS on sotorasib = 3.179 mo vs off = 3.191 mo; beta=-0.012, p=8.84e-01. Sotorasib provides essentially no PFS benefit in this subgroup.

3-way interaction treatment_sotorasib:kras_g12c:sex_female beta=-4.688, p=0.00e+00. The sotorasib effect in KRAS+ males is +4.66 months above the baseline; this is almost entirely cancelled by the -4.69 three-way interaction in KRAS+ females.
Within KRAS G12C+: sotorasib x brca2_mutation interaction beta=-2.550, p=2.29e-10. Patients who are both KRAS G12C+ and BRCA2-mutated lose much of the sotorasib benefit.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within KRAS G12C-mutated, BRCA2-wildtype, male (kras_g12c==1 & brca2_mutation==0 & sex_female==0) patients, sotorasib provides a very large positive PFS benefit relative to no sotorasib.
Within KRAS G12C-mutated, BRCA2-wildtype, male, ECOG<=1 patients, sotorasib provides a very large positive PFS benefit relative to no sotorasib (final refined positive sotorasib subgroup).

Within KRAS G12C-mutated female (sex_female==1) patients, sotorasib does NOT improve pfs_months relative to no sotorasib (negative subgroup defined by the variable that suppresses the treatment effect).
Within KRAS G12C-mutated and BRCA2-mutated patients, sotorasib does NOT improve pfs_months relative to no sotorasib (a second variable whose 'unfavorable' value suppresses the treatment effect).

Marker-treatment 'mismatch' subgroups (e.g., osimertinib in EGFR-wildtype, sotorasib in KRAS-wildtype, olaparib in BRCA2-wildtype, pembrolizumab in PDL1<0.01) all show null PFS effects, confirming biological specificity for sotorasib but absence of biomarker-driven benefit for the other three drugs.

analyses.result_summary: Subgroup 'kras_g12c==1 & sex_female==0 & brca2_mutation==0', n=3401, on=1198: mean on=8.021 mo vs off=3.224 mo; beta=4.797, p=0.00e+00.
Subgroup 'kras+ & male & brca2_neg & ecog<=1', n=2883, on=1006: mean on=8.309 mo vs off=3.452 mo; beta=4.857, p=0.00e+00.
Subgroup 'kras+ & female (sotorasib does NOT benefit)', n=2860, on=1009: mean on=3.179 mo vs off=3.191 mo; beta=-0.012, p=8.84e-01.
Subgroup 'kras+ & brca2+ (sotorasib does NOT benefit)', n=191, on=66: mean on=3.358 mo vs off=3.280 mo; beta=0.078, p=8.11e-01.

analyses.code: compare each treatment effect within the marker-NEGATIVE subgroup
analyses.result_summary: All marker-mismatch subgroup treatment effects are null: treatment_osimertinib in egfr_mutation==0: beta=0.006, p=8.05e-01; treatment_sotorasib in kras_g12c==0: beta=-0.005, p=7.99e-01; treatment_olaparib in brca2_mutation==0: beta=-0.026, p=2.35e-01; treatment_pembrolizumab in pdl1_tps<0.01: beta=0.053, p=3.63e-01.
